instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall optimize gear shifting for fuel efficiency.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform early upshift when throttle input is low.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain engine operation in efficient RPM range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall select gear that keeps engine speed within efficiency band.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Efficiency_RPM_Min AND Efficiency_RPM_Max THEN Maintain_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall avoid unnecessary downshifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay downshift when engine torque is sufficient.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall optimize shifts in Eco mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate eco shift map when Driving_Mode equals Eco.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall optimize shift timing using vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform upshift when vehicle speed exceeds eco threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift logic using estimated load.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when estimated load exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable efficiency optimization during high power demand.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall deactivate eco shift strategy when throttle exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect efficiency optimization faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when eco shift logic fails.

L4_requirements: IF Eco_Shift_Error = TRUE THEN Efficiency_Logic_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor efficiency optimization activity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostics during efficiency mode operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall periodically update efficiency optimization logic.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall refresh efficiency parameters at configured interval.
